name: telegram-codex
description: Run a local Telegram bot bridge that forwards messages to Codex CLI and replies in Telegram.

interface.shortDescription: Chat with local Codex from Telegram.
interface.longDescription: Telegram Codex packages a local long-polling bridge that receives messages from an allowlisted Telegram chat, runs Codex CLI locally, and sends the final response back to Telegram.
defaultPrompt: Set up Telegram access to Codex.
Help secure my Telegram Codex bot.
